title: UI layout components export module
purpose: Exports all core layout components and their type definitions for the Mermaid Collab UI.
module_context: This file serves as a central export point for all layout components including Header, Sidebar, SplitPane, SessionPanel, EditorToolbar, BottomTabBar, and MobileLayout with their respective props types.

steps.content: Export the Header component and its props type.
Export the Sidebar component and its props type.
Export the SplitPane and ThreeWaySplitPane components and their props types.
Export the SessionPanel component and its props types.
Export the EditorToolbar component and its props type.
Export the BottomTabBar component and its props types.
Export the MobileLayout component and its props types.
